- This site is optimized for 800 x 600 but universally adaptable to all screen resolutions and browsers, for AOL users please used uncompressed graphics. -
Welcome to SREDBZ's Dragonball Homepage!

           Hi, welcome to SREDBZ's Dragonball Homepage. This site is dedicated to the best anime in the world, Dragonball. The goal of this site is mainly to provide all the Dragonball material possible and to promote it in every way. The site is now a little older than a year and has grown greatly in change and success over the long period of time it's been up. First I would like to give thanks to whoever visits this site and hope that you enjoy your stay because without the visitors this site wouldn't be what it is today and really wouldn't serve much of a purpose. As you browse though the site you'll notice a large variety of different things ranging from multimedia computer files to summaries and links. I've done my best in trying to provide all new, fresh, and original material which sometimes makes it very difficult to add new updates. I usually anticipate that I'll make an update at least once every month (which unfortunately doesn't always seem possible) at no exact given date so please continue to check back at the site to see if there are any new additions. Anyway, I don't want to hold you back any further so to finish this little "introduction," I'd just like to conclude by telling you to feel free and email me with any comments, complaints, requests, corrections, etc. at SREDBZ@aol.com. Have fun! ^_^

Updates - 2/13/02
    SREDBZ's Dragonball Homepage has been alive and kicking for five years now. It's been a blast and an honor creating, designing, and maintaining for so long. To my disappointment, updates for the last two years have been rare to say the least. My sincerest of apologies go out to all those who have watched and waited in hopes of an amazing rebirth. I've been tremendously busy these last two years with flourishing sociality, grueling physical training, and enlightening academics. I'm sorry to say that it's very unlikely that I update this site again. I'll be leaving what's left of it up and dormant for as long as time will allow so that all those, new to the dragonball community, will have the opportunity of experiencing what I've tried to give to so many for so long.
This site is best viewed with:
 

To show appreciation for the success the visitors have brought, I've decided to give a prize to every 5000th visitor (ie. 5000, 10000, etc.). Just click here for instructions.
